original_image_tags: A vertical strip of black rectangular markings runs along the right edge of the page, resembling hole punches or binding marks.

elements.description: Page containing typed text with the heading 'INTRODUCTION' and a note at the top regarding 'AA or AR xx: auditor of national or regional promotion no. xx'. No photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts are present.

judge.reason: Description A identifies a specific visual element (vertical black markings), while Description B states no such visual elements are present, which is a direct contradiction on the presence of visual content.
